svg.title: Chess Web App — VS Solution Architecture
svg.desc: Three-project Visual Studio solution: Blazor frontend, ASP.NET Core API with SignalR, and shared domain library

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I configure Azure App Registration for chess SignalR auth?')
sendPrompt('How do I configure Azure SignalR Service vs self-hosted?')
sendPrompt('What Azure SQL or Cosmos DB should I use for chess game state?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement a SignalR GameHub for chess moves?')
sendPrompt('What controllers do I need for chess matchmaking?')
sendPrompt('How do I validate chess moves server-side?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure EF Core for chess game state?')
sendPrompt('How do I configure Azure AD JWT auth in ASP.NET Core?')
sendPrompt('What background services do I need for chess timeouts?')

g.text: Class Library · shared between client and server

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What chess domain models should I put in the shared project?')
sendPrompt('What DTOs do I need for chess SignalR messages?')
sendPrompt('What hub method names should I define as constants for chess SignalR?')

g.text: Blazor WebAssembly · or React/TS via Vite

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build a chess board component in Blazor?')
sendPrompt('How do I connect to SignalR from Blazor WASM?')
sendPrompt('What pages do I need for a chess web app?')
